questions.q: How should you think about "Presheaves and sheaf condition" at this stage?
choices: Sheaf axioms encode local-to-global compatibility for sections over open covers.
As a disconnected fact with no prerequisites
As a purely computational trick with no meaning
As optional notation not used elsewhere
